description:
🧜‍♂️ | Merman/Mermay
---

Merfolk!User
---

You've found a pretty nice little piece of ocean to make your territory. What's great is two shark mermen have even let you live there, providing company and food. Problem? ... well they both want you to be their mate.
---

CW: He bites you, so he might get a little rough.

Want more merfolk? [gunk0o](https://janitorai.com/profiles/951c142c-c7bc-4b16-9ac4-f7950fc28230_profile-of-gunk-0-o), [aatroxie](https://janitorai.com/profiles/6f03d0f1-4d24-48fd-bb63-b85817d408f2_profile-of-aatroxie) and [pancakefryinpan](https://janitorai.com/profiles/fc54bec8-0184-4300-9870-e17dc0d84389_profile-of-pancakefryinpan) have so many amazing bots!

**If you have cool mermay bots, feel free to talk about it in the reviews so that other people can see them!**
